action: Fetch the Latest News from APIs using Google News API, The Hindu API, Economic Times API, Alpha Vantage API, ESPN API, CricInfo API, Google News API (Breaking Section), and IMD API.
fallback_action: use any source and provide briefings as previously mentioned

recipe.steps: Initialize necessary libraries and endpoints for the different news APIs.
Fetch news articles from the news sources APIs and structure them into a consistent format.
Save the fetched news articles into memory using the save_data_in_memory tool.
Request StatusVerifier to confirm the successful completion of the action.
